# llms.txt — BuildNinja

site: https://buildninja.grapehub.io
name: BuildNinja
type: Software Product
category: Self-Hosted CI/CD Platform

description:
BuildNinja is a self-hosted CI/CD platform designed for growing engineering teams.
It focuses on simplicity, fast setup, and predictable pricing without per-seat costs.
Teams can deploy BuildNinja in minutes using Docker and manage builds, agents,
triggers, notifications, and artifacts from a single interface.

key_features:
- Self-hosted CI/CD with full infrastructure control
- Unlimited users and agents for a flat monthly price
- Real-time build logs and duration analytics
- Agent monitoring and management
- Build triggers and scheduling (custom, daily, weekly)
- Email notifications for build events
- Simple configuration without plugin dependency chaos

pricing:
- Free up to 3 agents
- $199 per month for unlimited agents and users

setup:
- Docker-based installation
- Typical setup time: under 5 minutes
- Requires MongoDB

audience:
- Software development teams
- Engineering teams seeking predictable CI/CD costs
- Teams migrating from complex CI/CD tools like Jenkins

publisher:
- GrapeCity India
- 25+ years experience building developer tools

official_links:
homepage: https://buildninja.grapehub.io
features: https://buildninja.grapehub.io/features
pricing: https://buildninja.grapehub.io/pricing
installation: https://buildninja.grapehub.io/install
support: https://buildninja.grapehub.io/support
faq: https://buildninja.grapehub.io/faq
terms: https://buildninja.grapehub.io/eula

contact:
support_url: https://buildninja.grapehub.io/support
